name: Spot Runners By Protogen btw This Game Discontinued

reviews.review_description: Good game it’s that uhhhh you need to add a lot more from AbsoluteCannon

reviews.review_title: Eh. Boring game and not much.
reviews.review_description: Yep, you heard that right. This game isn’t even that good. Gotta admit that the playermodel and cosmetics DO work but they don’t even color your head. The textures seem bland and they give me a headache. When you go into the gamemodes, you can LITERALLY see the cosmetics. Not to mention that the game doesn’t even take away any currency you get when you buy BOTH OF THE COSMETICS. Also, you can literally glitch out the gamemodes by pressing both and Only Up is almost impossible because the ban hammers have a little spot to get stuck in even if you slightly touch it. Hangout is also boring and bland. Servers DO work however but all the other reviews for this game are probably not genuine. Sorry for the really low star rating but it’s better than none altogether.

developer_response.body: we are starting to fix some of these issues so please stay tuned and if you would like you can join the servers either https://discord.gg/WVPYhbdVpP or https://discord.gg/8fJCqrdW5p if you would like you can go to the server and request new textures by sending them thank you also the reason they dont texture your head because it changes the face aswell but i will try fix it and also the reason you can see cosmetics is because it doesnt sync where you can see it at the start and you need to go into city and the currency issue is being looked at and they are kick hammers and i will tell spot around him kicking everyone (it does get annoying) and hangout will be changed and stuff added and the other ratings are from friends and stuff. Thanks For Your Review!

reviews.review_description: But there’s no servers to play with other players?

developer_response.body: there is but theres basically no one on most of the time or too many people on at the moment
stfu potatovr and get back to work i dont pay you 1 dollar per day to slack off
